ogTitle: Barraport West vs Barunah Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barraport West and Barunah Park.
heading: Barraport West vs Barunah Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barraport West, Victoria and Barunah Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barraport West has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Barunah Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barraport West or Barunah Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barraport West has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Barunah Park scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barraport West scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Barunah Park scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barraport West or Barunah Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barraport West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
